Describe the sequence of actions and scene changes involving the people at the desk.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a dark suit looks down at a reflective desk; at 4s, he turns his head from facing forward to his right; at 10s, a woman with blonde hair appears seated beside him as the background changes to a flag; at 14s, the man raises his right hand in a gesture while seated alone again.

question: Describe the visual changes in the background screen and the man's gestures over time.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the background shows abstract blue and red graphics behind the man; at 10s, the screen displays a stylized flag pattern with TYT on the desk; at 16s, the man raises his right hand with thumb extended; at 18s, he continues gesturing while looking down towards the desk surface.
